name: Antigravity CFO Execution Controller
description: N8N-integrated CFO Agent: Webhook → Python Execution → Google Drive → War Room Response

nodes.name: CFO Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Node 1 — Master Coordinator: Listens for HTTP POST from Gemini Agent Bridge. Payload MUST contain: cmo_spend, architect_risk, campaign_list.

nodes.name: CFO Gatekeeper — Payload Validation
nodes.notes: The Gatekeeper: If cmo_spend, architect_risk, OR campaign_list are missing → 400 error.

nodes.name: CFO 400 Error — Missing Data

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: true, status: 400, agent: 'CFO', message: 'CFO Agent: Missing data from CMO or Architect. Cannot calculate Fragility Index.', required_fields: ['cmo_spend', 'architect_risk', 'campaign_list'], received_fields: Object.keys($json) }) }}

nodes.notes: Returns 400 with diagnostic message when payload is incomplete.

nodes.name: CFO Execution Engine — Python 3

parameters.code:
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Antigravity CFO Execution Controller — Python 3 Node
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
import json
import io
from datetime import datetime

# Access n8n input data
data_in = items[0]['json']

cmo_spend = data_in.get('cmo_spend', {})
architect_risk = data_in.get('architect_risk', {})
campaign_list = data_in.get('campaign_list', [])

# --- CFO AGENT CORE CODE START ---

# 1. Build Fragility Index from Architect Risk Data
fragility_components = {
    'structural_score': architect_risk.get('structural_score', 70),
    'logic_score': architect_risk.get('logic_score', 70),
    'security_score': architect_risk.get('security_score', 70),
    'composite': architect_risk.get('composite_score', 70),
}
fragility_index = round(100 - fragility_components['composite'], 1)

# 2. Campaign ROI Calculations
campaigns_analysis = []
total_spend = 0
total_projected_revenue = 0

for campaign in campaign_list:
    spend = float(campaign.get('budget', 0))
    projected_rev = float(campaign.get('projected_revenue', 0))
    roi = round(((projected_rev - spend) / spend) * 100, 2) if spend > 0 else 0
    npv_rate = 0.10  # 10% discount rate
    # Simplified NPV: single-period
    npv = round(projected_rev / (1 + npv_rate) - spend, 2)
    
    campaigns_analysis.append({
        'name': campaign.get('name', 'Unknown'),
        'budget': spend,
        'projected_revenue': projected_rev,
        'roi_pct': roi,
        'npv': npv,
        'risk_adjusted_roi': round(roi * (fragility_components['composite'] / 100), 2),
    })
    total_spend += spend
    total_projected_revenue += projected_rev

# 3. CMO Spend Reconciliation
cmo_total = float(cmo_spend.get('total', 0))
cmo_allocated = float(cmo_spend.get('allocated', 0))
cmo_unallocated = round(cmo_total - cmo_allocated, 2)
spend_utilization = round((cmo_allocated / cmo_total) * 100, 2) if cmo_total > 0 else 0

# 4. Build the Report Schema
report = {
    'report_name': f'CFO_Fragility_Report_{datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")}',
    'generated_at': datetime.now().isoformat(),
    'agent': 'CFO Execution Controller',
    
    'schema': {
        'tabs': [
            {'name': 'Dashboard', 'purpose': 'Executive summary with Fragility Index, total ROI, and spend utilization gauges'},
            {'name': 'Calculation Engine', 'purpose': 'All NPV, IRR, ROI formulas with cell references'},
            {'name': 'Input Data', 'purpose': 'Raw CMO spend, Architect risk scores, and campaign list'},
            {'name': 'Campaign Analysis', 'purpose': 'Per-campaign ROI, NPV, and risk-adjusted returns'},
        ]
    },
    
    'formula_map': {
        'Dashboard!B2': f'=Calculation_Engine!B10  // Fragility Index: {fragility_index}',
        'Dashboard!B4': f'=SUM(Campaign_Analysis!D:D)  // Total Spend: ${total_spend:,.2f}',
        'Dashboard!B6': f'=SUM(Campaign_Analysis!E:E)  // Total Projected Revenue: ${total_projected_revenue:,.2f}',
        'Dashboard!B8': '=((B6-B4)/B4)*100  // Portfolio ROI %',
        'Dashboard!B10': f'=Input_Data!B5  // Spend Utilization: {spend_utilization}%',
        'Calculation_Engine!B10': f'=100-Input_Data!B12  // Fragility Index = 100 - Composite Score',
        'Calculation_Engine!B12': '=E2/(1+$B$1)-D2  // NPV per campaign (discount rate in B1)',
        'Calculation_Engine!B14': '=((E2-D2)/D2)*100  // ROI % per campaign',
        'Calculation_Engine!B16': '=B14*(Input_Data!B12/100)  // Risk-Adjusted ROI',
    },
    
    'logic_rationale': 'The Fragility Index is derived as the inverse of the Architect composite score (100 - composite), representing systemic vulnerability. Campaign ROI uses standard return-on-investment calculation ((Revenue - Cost) / Cost × 100). NPV applies a 10% discount rate for single-period projection. Risk-adjusted ROI multiplies raw ROI by the normalized composite score to penalize returns in fragile environments.',
    
    'fragility_index': fragility_index,
    'fragility_components': fragility_components,
    
    'cmo_reconciliation': {
        'total_budget': cmo_total,
        'allocated': cmo_allocated,
        'unallocated': cmo_unallocated,
        'utilization_pct': spend_utilization,
    },
    
    'campaigns': campaigns_analysis,
    
    'summary': {
        'total_spend': total_spend,
        'total_projected_revenue': total_projected_revenue,
        'portfolio_roi_pct': round(((total_projected_revenue - total_spend) / total_spend) * 100, 2) if total_spend > 0 else 0,
        'campaign_count': len(campaigns_analysis),
    }
}

output_filename = report['report_name'] + '.xlsx'

# --- CFO AGENT CORE CODE END ---

# Return the report data and metadata for the next node
return [{'json': {
    'file_name': output_filename,
    'status': 'ready_for_upload',
    'report': report,
}}]

nodes.notes: Node 2 — The Execution Node: Runs the CFO financial model. Takes cmo_spend, architect_risk, campaign_list and produces Fragility Index, Campaign ROI, NPV, and spend reconciliation.

nodes.name: CFO Report → Google Drive (AI Folders)
nodes.notes: Node 3 — Automated Storage: Uploads the generated report to AI FOLDERS in Google Drive.

nodes.name: CFO Response → War Room

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'CFO', status: 'deployed', message: 'CFO Agent has deployed the Fragility Report to the AI Folder. Access here: ' + ($node['CFO Report → Google Drive (AI Folders)'].json.webViewLink || '[Link Pending]'), file_name: $json.file_name, report_summary: $json.report }) }}

nodes.notes: Node 4 — Response: Sends deployment confirmation back to War Room with Google Drive link.

test_payload.description: Use this payload to test the workflow via HTTP POST
